title: KeyDupe
description: this project is a try to stop crate key dupes
body:
Its a simple plugin to stop crate key dupes

info:-  I will only continue this plugin if it gets enough attention & is useful (in case there is another good plugin came)

# Features

- easy to use
- anti-dupe
- add any material
- alert on dupe
- flexible
- any crate plugin(until it clicks with the key see FAQ)

# Installation

- download the plugin from the spigot page
- then put it in the plugins folder
- restart
- setup as in video
- enjoy

# Permission

- dupe.admin
- dupe.player

# Commands

- /keydupe add
- /dkey give <player> <key>
- /key recover

# FAQ

Q1. how this plugin works?
A: this plugin creates similar keys like your crate plugin but it injects with a uuid and save that uuid in a file, when you click a crate with that key it ckeck the uuid of key and key in file if its same no alert will be given.

Q2. which plugins it supports?
A: it should support any crate plugin which works when you click a crate with key. means if your crate plugin checks players inventor then this plugin is not for you. this plugin is tested with crazycrates.

# Donators

- MCbasement - $50

# Disclaimer

you are welcome to suggest any changes
**plugin is new and in beta not suggested for production due to false report can be there**
have any problems please come dm in discord
